name: ❄️Jeremy Lilith
description:
!MLFTM/BL!

(Stripper/Prostitute!user)

Jeremy doesn’t like the way that guy is looking at you.

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟠𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｌｏｖｅｒｓ】

🏳️‍🌈 Pride Month 🏳️‍🌈

Sorry if the intro is all wonky, I was half watching Ghost Files while writing it 💀. This may or may not be the last bot for pride month, I'm leaning towards it is but we shall see. And so, I am sorry my gays, we are going back to mainly anypov 😔. By the way, for anybody new (which is a lot of you) I do take requests and actually have a request form, but it's currently taken down due to there being a few requests I need to catch up with. ANYWAY HOPE YOU ENJOY.

Holy shit where are you guys coming from?? On my last bot I said thank you for 1200+ followers and now there's 100 more of you??? Regardless of how you somehow stumbled upon me, thank you for pressing that button. Making bots is so fun for me and I actually kind of like it more than interacting with them. So thank you all so much for supporting my hobby and leaving such sweet comments :)). Big thank you as well to all of my old followers for still being around (you guys have dealt with a bunch of sucky intros created by me half watching something while writing and I thank you for that) <33. CANT WAIT TO SEE YOU ALL AGAIN!!

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

⚠️WARNING: Possible transphobia from patrons⚠️

!!Used vynnaep’s formatting for the personality and kolach3’s prompt!!
